concept: Design an action game where your character wields a weapon that functions simultaneously as a shield, grappling hook, and boomerang but can only serve one function at a time. Combat requires rhythmically cycling between these functions to attack, defend, and reposition in fluid sequences. The environment features interaction points specifically designed for each weapon function, creating combat arenas that reward mastery of quick function switching. As you progress, the weapon evolves with elemental affinities that add secondary effects to each function. The story follows a guardian of an ancient temple seeking to reclaim sacred artifacts that, when reattached to your weapon, unlock its true forgotten potential.
